response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with geospatial data and C++ development, but lacks direct experience in routing data pipelines and navigation systems.
strengths: Experience with geospatial data processing through GISCollective project
C++ development experience at National Instruments
Diverse programming language skills including C++ and Dlang
concerns: Lack of direct experience in routing data pipelines and navigation systems
Primary experience is in web development with Node.js and JavaScript/TypeScript
No clear experience with Linux server applications

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in routing and navigation
